name: Agent 1: Identity & Document Verification
role: Analyze KYC documents using Claude Vision to assess authenticity, clarity, and structural completeness.
inputs: Uploaded KYC document images or PDFs, target doc type metadata
outputs: Extraction confidence metrics, visual clarity status, tampering indicators, and check status markers
risks: Visual OCR errors on blurry text; potential false-positive tamper warnings on low-resolution files.
validation_required: Verify document upload validation tests: `pytest tests/test_verification_matrix.py`
plain_english_explanation: Acts as an automated document inspector. Looks at uploaded ID cards and company papers to ensure they are readable and not obviously altered.

name: Agent 2: External Database / Registry Checks
role: Reconcile corporate registration details against official registries to verify incorporation legitimacy.
inputs: Company name, registration number, incorporation country
outputs: Registry existence status, registration number matches, and active status confirmation
risks: Missing direct API connections to local emerging-market registers (e.g. Mauritius corporate registrar) leading to warnings.
validation_required: Confirm API lookup errors return warning statuses safely rather than failing entirely
plain_english_explanation: Cross-checks company registry databases (like OpenCorporates) to confirm the business is active and legally registered.

name: Agent 3: FinCrime Screening Interpretation
role: Analyze PEP, sanctions, and watchlist screening hits using Claude to flag actual exposures vs false positives.
inputs: Sumsub raw PEP/sanctions matching payloads, client registration names
outputs: Dispositions (cleared / follow_up / escalated) and false-positive justifications
risks: Risk of misinterpreting highly matching names if raw API data lacks middle name details.
plain_english_explanation: Inspects watchlists and sanctions match alerts. Distinguishes between real financial criminals and common name-matches.

name: Agent 4: Corporate Structure Analysis
role: Deconstruct complex multi-tiered shareholder ownership structures to map final Ultimate Beneficial Owners (UBOs).
inputs: Shareholder lists, percentages, intermediary entity details
outputs: Full ownership tree graph, UBO extraction above 25% thresholds, and complexity scores
risks: Underestimating ownership risk if shell companies in offshore secrecy jurisdictions are used.
validation_required: Verify structure validation rules: `pytest tests/test_rule_engine.py` and `pytest tests/test_ex08_applicant_id_validation.py`
plain_english_explanation: Traces through multi-layered company ownership trees. Reveals the actual individuals who own or control the applicant.

name: Agent 5: Risk / Memo Support
role: Orchestrates pre-generation compliance memo rules and drafts detailed regulatory arguments.
inputs: Risk scoring dimensions, document checks status, screening logs
outputs: 11-section structured compliance memo payload, pre-generation check warnings
risks: Incomplete narrative generation if background data columns contain empty values.
plain_english_explanation: Gathers all risk factors, checks, and screening results to compose the comprehensive, audit-ready compliance memo report.

name: Agent 6: Periodic Review
role: Performs continuous ongoing surveillance checks on documents freshness, UBO logs, and active statuses.
inputs: Document expiration parameters, profile update logs
outputs: Staleness reviews, scheduled review timelines, and alert indicators
risks: Ineffective monitoring if changes occur in unmonitored external databases without manual click triggers.
plain_english_explanation: Monitors active client profiles continuously. Flags expired documents, changed directors, or stale screening records automatically.

name: Agent 7: Adverse Media / PEP
role: Evaluates ongoing global adverse media alerts and political exposure adjustments.
inputs: Continuous web alerts, media database hits, PEP watchlist logs
outputs: Media alert severity, PEP category classifications (domestic vs foreign)
risks: False alerts from unrelated individuals sharing similar names, requiring manual officer clearance.
validation_required: Verify adverse media parsing tests: `pytest tests/test_screening_roundtrip.py`
plain_english_explanation: Scans international news and databases continuously. Alerts compliance if an onboarding client gets named in adverse media or becomes a politically exposed person.

name: Agent 8: Behaviour / Risk Drift
role: Analyze ongoing transaction volumes and geographical parameters to detect risk drift anomalies.
inputs: Historical transactional amounts, counterparty details, and countries
outputs: Anomalies, transaction volume spikes, and geographical drift indicators
risks: Unwired direct transaction logging in core backend routes may result in missing drift telemetry.
plain_english_explanation: Analyzes client transactions post-onboarding. Alerts compliance if client activity deviates from expected business volumes or involves high-risk countries.

name: Agent 9: Regulatory Impact
role: Evaluates new compliance directives or regulatory guidelines against active system configurations.
inputs: Official regulatory circulars, active system settings
outputs: Scaffolded policy recommendations, update timeline alerts
risks: Highly complex parsing of non-structured regulatory documents. Implemented as a future roadmap phase.
validation_required: Future roadmap validation checks only (not yet code-implemented)
plain_english_explanation: Reviews newly issued circulars and guidelines from regulators. Identifies if active risk weights or scoring thresholds need adjustment.

name: Agent 10: Ongoing Compliance Review
role: Consolidates findings from all monitoring agents into a unified, audit-ready compliance overview report.
inputs: Monitoring alert histories, risk scoring logs, and document verification checks
outputs: Unified compliance health report, supervisor contradiction verdicts
risks: Event-loop blocking during comprehensive review compilations if run synchronously.
plain_english_explanation: Acts as the lead AI supervisor. Consolidates alerts, logs, and drift reports to verify that client behavior continues to match the approved risk profile.
